p.seg: To all who shall see or hear this charter, Simon Mauleverer and Gilbert Avenel send greeting.

Let your whole community know us to have granted and by our present charter to have made firm to Helen daughter of Simon of Lindsay the land of ‘Hungerigge’ in the territory of Mow, that is, which the said Helen holds in our feu of Mow of Robert of Pollok and Isabel his wife. And in addition a portion of land near ‘Hederedesete’ in our land, which is called ‘Holemede’. For the said Helen and her heirs to have and to hold of us and our heirs for ever by right of heritage, freely, quitely, fully and honourably, in the same way in all things and through all things, just as the charter of Simon of Lindsay, her father, shows, bears witness and confirms. And that this our grant and confirmation to the same Helen and her heirs should endure established and undisputed into the future, I Simon Mauleverer apply my seal to this charter. And I Gilbert Avenel, since I do not have my own seal, have confirmed it with the seal of my father, William Avenel.
With these witnesses: Richard of Lincoln; Ralph le Nain; Simon of Grubbit; Adam of Yetholm; John of Munford; Adam son of Nicholas; Henry son of Ulf; and many others.
